column1: # mzPeak corpus benchmark manifest — one row per dataset.
# Columns (TAB-separated): id  vendor  instrument  format  engine  raw_path  convert_flags  accession
#   engine = host (convert locally) | box (convert on flash-workstation via tools/corpus_bench.sh --box)
#   convert_flags are passed verbatim to mzpeak-convert; ratios are mzPeak/raw on the data representation.
#   Datasets with raw < 20 MB are auto-EXCLUDED from the headline ratio (Parquet/ZIP floor dominates).
